ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., WR) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player plays for */,
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the franchise the player is part of */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted with */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_franchise_id FOREIGN KEY ("franchise_id") REFERENCES franchises ("franchise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the franchise the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team plays in */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team plays in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_franchise_id FOREIGN KEY ("franchise_id") REFERENCES franchises ("franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "franchises" (
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each franchise */,
  "franchise_name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the franchise was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, scout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the game was played in */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week the game was played in */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions in the game */,
  "targets" INTEGER /* Number of targets in the game */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Number of yards in the game */,
  "yards_after_catch" INTEGER /* Number of yards after catch in the game */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
